name: Fortune Christmas Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Make Mysticandy Dough using 4 peppermint candy rolls. Color half of the dough red and the other half pink.
3. Pinch off pieces of dough about the size of a marble.
4. Roll the dough into balls.
5. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the bottoms are golden brown.
6. Remove from the sheet immediately.
